title: Gentle Hands
lesson: Be gentle and kind to little animals.
prompts: In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the green grass, beaming with excitement at a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Warm sunlight. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the green grass, beaming with excitement and raising both hands high above their head, facing a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} The small fluffy brown puppy crouches low on the grass facing partly away from the child, ears flattened back against its head, wide worried eyes, tail tucked tight, one front paw lifted and body coiled as if ready to run, frightened but not yet bolting. Warm sunlight. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — a small fluffy brown puppy bolts away in fear, its body low and tense to the ground, ears flattened back against its head, tail clamped tightly between its legs, head whipped back over its shoulder with wide, frightened eyes and the whites showing — clearly terrified and fleeing, not playing. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image leans forward on the grass with both hands reaching out too eagerly, looking surprised that the puppy ran off, with a surprised expression. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Warm sunlight. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels in the mid-ground, watching attentively {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} crouches calmly and holds out one slow, open hand to show how to be soft and gentle with a small fluffy brown puppy. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone on the green grass, very gently stroking the back of a small fluffy brown puppy with one slow, soft hand, with a calm, tender smile. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Warm sunlight. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny home garden — green grass, flowers, a low wooden fence behind — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits, with a joyful smile, gently cradling a happy, content small fluffy brown puppy in their lap. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} sits beside them, one hand resting gently on the child's shoulder, looking on proudly. Make the interaction read physically: the child cradles the puppy in their lap while the man's hand rests on the child's shoulder and his gaze turns to the child and the puppy. Warm golden sunlight. Exactly one child and one man in the frame, and no other people.
gists: In a sunny home garden with a low wooden fence, the child kneels alone, beaming with excitement at a small brown puppy sitting a little way ahead.
In the garden, the small brown puppy sits low and tense, ears flattened and tail tucked, looking shy and frightened, while the child kneels a little way back, holding still and watching quietly.
In the garden, the child leans forward with both hands reaching out too eagerly and a surprised look as the small brown puppy bolts away, clearly frightened — the child was too fast and scared it.
In the garden, the child kneels watching attentively while the father crouches calmly holding out one slow, open hand to a small brown puppy, showing how to be gentle.
In the garden, the child kneels alone very gently stroking the back of the small brown puppy with one soft hand, calm and tender.
In the garden in golden light, the child cradles the happy puppy in their lap while the father rests a hand on their shoulder, looking on proudly.
texts: In the sunny garden, {NAME} met a little brown puppy. "Hello, puppy!" said {NAME}, full of excitement.
But the little puppy sat very still, its ears down low and its tail tucked tight. "You look scared, little puppy," said {NAME} softly. The puppy was shy and afraid.
{NAME} reached out too fast, and the puppy shrank back, afraid. "Oh no, I scared it," said {NAME}. "That was too quick."
Dad knelt down beside {NAME}. "Be gentle," he said softly, holding out one slow, open hand. "Like this?" asked {NAME}. "Just like that," said Dad.
So {NAME} stroked the puppy very gently, soft and slow. "Good puppy," {NAME} whispered. The puppy stayed close, calm and happy.
{NAME} cuddled the happy puppy close. "Good job," said Dad with a smile. "Gentle hands are kind hands," said {NAME}.
